summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KLEAN Barbershop SEO optimization and conversion features. All core functionality working excellently - SEO titles, Google Reviews widget, booking system integration, analytics tracking. 91.7% success rate with one minor meta description issue identified.

seo_issues.issue: Default meta description 'A product of emergent.sh' overrides SEO-optimized descriptions
seo_issues.root_cause: Static meta description in /app/frontend/public/index.html line 7 conflicts with React Helmet
seo_issues.solution: Remove or update default meta description in index.html to allow React Helmet to manage SEO descriptions

passed_tests: Google Reviews widget displays correctly with 5/5 rating and stars
Google Reviews widget visible on homepage with proper data-testid
Hero section booking button redirects to Setmore with target='_blank'
Navigation booking button redirects to Setmore with target='_blank'
Footer booking button redirects to Setmore with target='_blank'
Mobile floating booking button visible and functional with target='_blank'
Analytics page view tracking working with console logs
Analytics booking click tracking working with console logs
All booking buttons use correct Setmore URL: klean-barbershop-booking.setmore.com
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix meta description override by removing or updating the default meta description in /app/frontend/public/index.html line 7. The current 'A product of emergent.sh' description overrides the SEO-optimized descriptions from the seo.js config. React Helmet is properly configured but the static HTML meta tag takes precedence.
